title: Cymatics
description: 20,000 particles forming wave patterns. Move mouse to control frequency. Click to reset.

title: Signal
description: Layered Lissajous waveforms. Move mouse to modulate frequency and amplitude. Click to randomize.

title: Bayer Gradient
description: Animated gradient through Bayer 8x8 ordered dithering. Move mouse to shift center.

title: Ball Movers
description: Gaussian random-walk particles. Click to spawn new movers.

title: Noise Terrain
description: 3D Perlin noise terrain. Move mouse: Y = rotation, X = noise scale. Click to cycle render mode.

title: Langtons Ant
description: Five ants with different rulesets competing for territory. Click to spawn a new ant.

title: DLA
description: Diffusion-limited aggregation. Slow crystalline growth. Click to place new seeds.

title: Grid Distort
description: Dot grid warped by noise drift. Move mouse to distort nearby points.

title: Field Lines
description: Electric field lines between charges. Mouse acts as a moving charge. Click to place new charges.

title: Wind Particles
description: Particles driven by wind as velocity lines. Click to randomize wind direction.

title: Neural Pulse
description: Connected nodes with traveling amber signal pulses. Click near a node to fire it.

title: Particles Repel
description: 3,000 particles that flee from your cursor. Move mouse to push them around.

title: Game of Life
description: Conway cellular automata. Cells age from white to gray. Click and drag to draw new cells.

title: Cascade
description: Text blocks falling with gravity. Move mouse near settled blocks to push them up.

title: Cellular Automaton
description: 1D Rule 90 automaton with varying dot sizes. Click to reset.

title: Contour
description: Animated topographic contour lines. Move mouse to raise a hill. Click to regenerate terrain.

title: Physarum
description: 15,000 slime mold agents with wandering attractors. Move mouse to pull nearby agents. Click to spawn a burst.

title: Genetic Algorithm
description: Particles evolve spacing via DNA. Click and drag to draw obstacles.

title: Recursive Tree
description: Fractal branching tree with HSB rainbow. Move mouse: X = branch rotation, Y = angle and extension.

title: Ecosystem
description: Flocking organisms with energy. Click and hold to create a recharge zone. Drag to move it.

title: Spirograph
description: Layered hypotrochoid curves. Move mouse to control radius ratios. Click to regenerate.

title: Orbit
description: N-body gravitational system with orbital trails. Click and drag to launch new bodies.

title: Flowfield
description: 10,000 particles following Perlin noise vectors. Click to randomize flow.

title: Boids
description: 1,500 flocking agents with separation, alignment, cohesion. Move mouse to repel nearby boids.

title: Galaxy Close Up
description: Mass particles attracted to mouse with Gaussian drift. Click or drag to spawn new particles.

title: Solar System
description: 3D orbital system with black hole gravity. Move mouse: X = speed, Y = mass. WASD moves the black hole. Space to regenerate. Click to add stars.
